<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"修改空间名称"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/spaces/name"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



传入空间 ID，更新该空间的名称。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["spaceId","name"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"空间 ID。"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"新空间名称。"}},"example":{"spaceId":"space-livingroom-001","name":"新客厅"},"title":"UpdateSpaceNameRequest"},"example":{"spaceId":"space-livingroom-001","name":"新客厅"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
